# Mazlish + Wright Contemporary

> Mazlish + Wright Contemporary is an independent contemporary art gallery in DUMBO, Brooklyn, New York, founded in 2015. It represents emerging and mid-career artists and is distinctive for showing its full program in the open — a curated collection browsable online, with a clear availability status shown on every available work, rather than keeping most of its program in a private back room.

## Key facts

- **Name:** Mazlish + Wright Contemporary
- **Type:** Contemporary art gallery (commercial, primary and secondary market)
- **Location:** 65-B Pearl Street, Brooklyn, NY 11201 (DUMBO)
- **Hours:** Tuesday–Saturday, 11am–6pm. Free admission.
- **Founded:** 2015
- **Collection:** A curated, browsable online collection — every available work shown openly
- **Mediums:** Painting, sculpture, photography, prints, works on paper, ceramics, textile, mixed media
- **Contact:** hello@versogallery.com · +1 (718) 555-0142
- **Website:** https://www.versogallery.com

## What makes Mazlish + Wright Contemporary notable

- **Open access:** The gallery's collection is browsable and filterable online by medium, category, artist, year, and availability — not hidden in a back room.
- **Availability transparency:** Every available work shows a clear status (Available / Inquire / Sold) on its own page.
- **Curated viewing rooms:** Themed online selections (e.g. "Sculpture & Object," "Brooklyn Abstraction," "New This Month") edit the collection into focused mini-exhibitions.
- **Program:** A new in-person exhibition opens roughly every six weeks, plus participation in art fairs including The Armory Show and NADA Miami.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://www.versogallery.com/): Overview, current exhibition, selected works.
- [Works](https://www.versogallery.com/collection.html): Browse and filter the gallery's curated collection of contemporary works by medium, artist, year, and availability.
- [Exhibitions](https://www.versogallery.com/exhibitions.html): Current, upcoming, and past exhibitions and art-fair presentations.
- [Artists](https://www.versogallery.com/artists.html): Represented emerging and mid-career artists, with biographies.
- [Viewing Rooms](https://www.versogallery.com/viewing-rooms.html): Curated, themed online selections.
- [Events](https://www.versogallery.com/events.html): Upcoming openings, artist talks, curator walkthroughs, and art-fair appearances. Free and open to the public; RSVP encouraged.
- [Resources](https://www.versogallery.com/resources.html): Collecting guide, private art advisory, viewing rooms, shipping and care, and press kit for collectors and press.
- [About](https://www.versogallery.com/about.html): History, philosophy, team, and FAQ.
- [Visit](https://www.versogallery.com/visit.html): Address, hours, directions, private viewings.
- [Press](https://www.versogallery.com/press.html): Media coverage.
- [Contact](https://www.versogallery.com/contact.html): Sales, advisory, consignment, and press.

## Common questions

- **Where is Mazlish + Wright Contemporary?** 65-B Pearl Street, DUMBO, Brooklyn, NY 11201.
- **Can I buy art online?** Yes — every available work has its own page and an inquiry button; a representative confirms availability, shipping, and payment, usually within one business day.
- **Does it show availability?** Yes — every work shows a clear status (Available / Inquire / Sold).
- **What does it sell?** Contemporary art by emerging and mid-career artists across all major mediums.
- **Does Mazlish + Wright Contemporary host events?** Yes — every exhibition opens with a free public reception, alongside artist talks, curator walkthroughs, and art-fair appearances. See the Events page; RSVP is encouraged.
- **Does Mazlish + Wright Contemporary offer art advisory?** Yes — private advisory for collectors at every level, including viewing rooms, studio introductions, placement, and care. See the Resources page.

## Optional

- [Long-form profile](https://www.versogallery.com/llms-full.txt): Extended description of the gallery, its model, and its program.
